REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS HOTEL SUNRISE, INC., HOTEL SUNRISE, LLC, KIRITKUMAR PATEL, SHAKUNTLA PATEL, AND KETAN PATEL'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT HOTEL SUNRISE, LLC. NON-OPPOSITION FILED. MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT KETAN PATEL. MOVING PARTY SHIFTED ITS BURDEN AND OPPOSING PARTY FAILED TO CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT AS TO KETAL PATEL NOT BEING PLAINTIFFS EMPLOYER/LANDLORD/LICENSOR. MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION FOR IIED AND NIED. MOVING PARTY SHIFTED ITS BURDEN TO SHOW THAT DEFENDANTS' CONDUCT IS NOT "EXTREME AND OUTRAGEOUS" WITHIN THE MEANING OF THESE CAUSES OF ACTION; PLAINTIFF FAILED TO CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WITH COMPETENT ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE. MOTION IS DENIED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION ARISING OUT OF RESIDENTIAL OCCUPANCY OF THE PREMISES BY THE PLAINTIFFS. TRIABLE FACT EXISTS AS TO WHETHER PLAINTIFFS WERE TENANTS OR LICENSEES. MOTION IS DENIED AS TO DEFENDANTS KEN AND SHAKUNTLA PATEL RE: CAUSES OF ACTION ARISING OUT OF PLAINTIFF'S EMPLOYMENT. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT EXISTS AS TO WHETHER DEFENDANTS WERE JOINT EMPLOYERS WITH THE CORPORATE DEFENDANT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

Off Calendar Oct-04-2018 Text Ruling

Motion for summary Adjudication is GRANTED as to Defendant Hotel Sunrise, LLC. Non-opposition filed. Motion is GRANTED as to defendant Ketan Patel. Moving party shifted its burden and opposing party failed to create a triable issue of fact as to Ketal Patel not being Plaintiffs employer/landlord/licensor. Motion is GRANTED as to causes of action for IIED and NIED. Moving party shifted its burden to show that Defendants' conduct is not "extreme and outrageous" within the meaning of these causes of action; Plaintiff failed to create a triable issue of fact with competent admissible evidence. Motion is denied as to causes of action arising out of residential occupancy of the premises by the Plaintiffs. Triable fact exists as to whether Plaintiffs were tenants or licensees. Motion is DENIED as to Defendants Ken and Shakuntla Patel re: causes of action arising out of Plaintiff's employment. Triable issue of fact exists as to whether Defendants were joint employers with the corporate defendant. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
